name: CONSONANTS (PULMONIC)
comment: Symbols to the right in a cell are voiced, to the left are voiceless. Shaded areas denote articulations judged impossible.

name: OTHER SYMBOLS
comment: Affricates and double articulations can be represented by two symbols joined by a tie bar if necessary.

name: DIACRITICS
comment: Some diacritics may be placed above a symbol with a descender.

name: VOWELS
comment: Where symbols appear in pairs, the one to the right represents a rounded vowel.
